name: Boston Brown Bread (Crock Pot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flours, cornmeal, baking powder, soda, and salt.
2. Combine egg, molasses, sugar, and oil.
3. Add flour mixture to molasses mixture alternately with buttermilk; beat well.
4. Stir in raisins.
5. Turn batter into two well greased 16-ounce vegetable cans.
6. Cover cans tightly with foil.
7. Place cans in crockpot.
8. Cover and cook on high heat setting for 3 hours.
9. Remove cans from cooker.
10. Cool 10 minutes in cans.
11. Serve warm.
